eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 02:36 PM ON FEB 21, 2026 Effective until 02:36 AM FEB 22, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: AMBER Alert: Child Abduction- 118th & Edgemont Ave, Avondale, AZ, 3-Year-old black female, Kehlani Rogers, last seen wearing pink pajamas with braids. Suspect Merena white female, short, thin, brown hair, hazel eyes, wearing white shirt, pink or purple pants and ponytail. Call 9-1-1 with information. Authorities say that the child may be in the company of Suspect Merena short, thin, white female, brown hair, hazel eyes, wearing white shirt, pink or purple pants and ponytail, last seen near 118th and Edgemont Ave on foot. If you have any information on the where abouts of the child, please contact 911 immediately.
